faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in Bushwick?
faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in Bushwick typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your apartment or building, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in Bushwick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Bushwick. We understand that cockroach infestations require immediate attention, especially in multi-unit buildings where roaches can spread quickly between apartments. Call us before noon for potential same-day treatment.

faqs.question: Do cockroaches in Bushwick buildings require special treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, Bushwick's older walkups and converted industrial buildings often have shared walls, pipe chases, and structural gaps that allow cockroaches to travel between units. We use a combination of gel baits, targeted sprays, and exclusion techniques designed specifically for these building types to eliminate roaches at the source.

faqs.question: Will one treatment eliminate my cockroach problem?
faqs.answer: Most cockroach infestations in Bushwick require 2-3 treatments spaced 2-3 weeks apart for complete elimination. This ensures we eliminate adults, nymphs, and newly hatched roaches. We include follow-up visits in our service and guarantee our work with free re-treatments if roaches return within our warranty period.
